# Bundled UI fonts

Chroni bundles the following unmodified font software through Fontsource:

- Noto Sans SC Variable 5.2.10 — Copyright Google Inc.
- Noto Serif SC Variable 5.2.10 — Copyright Google Inc.
- Source Sans 3 Variable 5.2.9 — Copyright Google Inc.
- Source Serif 4 Variable 5.2.9 — Copyright 2014–2023 Adobe (https://github.com/adobe-fonts/source-serif)

All fonts are distributed under the SIL Open Font License, Version 1.1. The complete license text is included in `OFL-1.1.txt` in this directory.
